name: APY Calculator (Industrial Grade)
description: Calculates Annual Percentage Yield (APY) with compounding effects, adjusted for industrial engineering standards including Lean, Six Sigma, and ISO metrics. Provides breakdown, loss drivers, and actionable suggestions.

inputs.label: Nominal Annual Interest Rate
inputs.businessContext: The stated annual interest rate before compounding, as per ISO 8000-1 financial data standards.

businessContext_i18n.en: The stated annual interest rate before compounding, as per ISO 8000-1 financial data standards.

inputs.label: Compounding Frequency
inputs.businessContext: Number of compounding periods per year, aligned with WERC financial metrics for logistics and supply chain.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of compounding periods per year, aligned with WERC financial metrics for logistics and supply chain.

inputs.label: Investment Period
inputs.businessContext: Duration of investment in years, used for multi-period APY calculation per Lean Six Sigma project timelines.

businessContext_i18n.en: Duration of investment in years, used for multi-period APY calculation per Lean Six Sigma project timelines.

inputs.label: Initial Principal
inputs.businessContext: Starting capital amount, critical for ROI analysis in industrial engineering projects.

businessContext_i18n.en: Starting capital amount, critical for ROI analysis in industrial engineering projects.

inputs.label: Management Fee
inputs.businessContext: Annual fee deducted from returns, typical in investment funds, referenced in ISO 31000 risk management.

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual fee deducted from returns, typical in investment funds, referenced in ISO 31000 risk management.

inputs.label: Expected Inflation Rate
inputs.businessContext: Annual inflation rate to compute real APY, per Six Sigma DMAIC control phase.

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual inflation rate to compute real APY, per Six Sigma DMAIC control phase.

inputs.label: Tax Rate on Gains
inputs.businessContext: Capital gains tax rate applied to nominal returns, aligned with ISO 14000 environmental cost accounting.

businessContext_i18n.en: Capital gains tax rate applied to nominal returns, aligned with ISO 14000 environmental cost accounting.

inputs.label: Continuous Compounding
inputs.businessContext: If true, uses e^rt formula for maximum compounding frequency, per Lean continuous improvement philosophy.

businessContext_i18n.en: If true, uses e^rt formula for maximum compounding frequency, per Lean continuous improvement philosophy.

rules.message: Compounding frequency must be between 1 and 365.
Investment period must be greater than 0.
Tax rate must be between 0% and 50%.
Continuous compounding overrides frequency; set frequency to 365 for consistency.

thresholds.message: Inflation rate exceeds 5%, real APY may be negative.
Nominal APY below 1%, consider alternative investments.
Management fee above 2%, significantly reduces net return.
Real APY is negative, purchasing power is eroding.

formulas.name: Effective Annual Rate (EAR)
formulas.description: Calculates the effective annual rate considering compounding frequency.

formulas.name: Gross Future Value
formulas.description: Future value of principal before fees and taxes.

formulas.name: Fee Adjustment Factor
formulas.description: Reduction factor due to management fees over the period.

formulas.name: Net Future Value (After Fees)
formulas.description: Future value after deducting management fees.

formulas.name: Tax Adjustment Factor
formulas.description: Factor for capital gains tax on net profit.

formulas.name: After-Tax Future Value
formulas.description: Future value after fees and taxes.

formulas.name: Nominal APY
formulas.description: Annual Percentage Yield before inflation adjustment.

formulas.name: Real APY (Inflation Adjusted)
formulas.description: APY adjusted for inflation, reflecting true purchasing power growth.

primary.label: Annual Percentage Yield (Nominal)
primary.description: Primary result: effective annual return after fees and taxes, before inflation.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Fee Erosion
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Percentage of principal lost to management fees over the period.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Tax Erosion
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Percentage of gains lost to taxes.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Inflation Erosion
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Reduction in purchasing power due to inflation.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Compounding Frequency Gap
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Difference between continuous and discrete compounding (if applicable).

suggestedActions.label: Negotiate Lower Fees
suggestedActions.description: If fee_percentage > 1.5, consider lower-cost investment vehicles to improve net APY.

suggestedActions.label: Increase Compounding Frequency
suggestedActions.description: If compounding_frequency < 12 and not continuous, switch to monthly or daily compounding for higher EAR.

suggestedActions.label: Tax-Loss Harvesting
suggestedActions.description: If tax_rate > 20, explore tax-advantaged accounts or harvesting strategies.

suggestedActions.label: Inflation-Protected Securities
suggestedActions.description: If inflation_rate > 3, consider TIPS or I-Bonds to preserve real returns.

suggestedActions.label: Enable Continuous Compounding
suggestedActions.description: If allowed, switch to continuous compounding for maximum theoretical yield.

dataConfidenceAdjusted.label: Data Confidence Adjusted APY
dataConfidenceAdjusted.description: APY adjusted for input uncertainty using a confidence factor (0.8 to 1.0) based on data quality.
